description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fedora:26 Docker image, with a before_script that runs `dnf --setopt=cachedir=$(pwd)/dnf-cache --quiet --refresh --assumeyes install $BUILDTOOLS_PKGS $GLIB2_PKGS $GSIGNOND_PKG $LIBS_PKGS $DOCGEN_PKGS $GIR_PKGS $CI_PKGS $LOCALE_PKGS` and a cache keyed dnf-cache storing the dnf-cache/ directory. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build_x86-64 job that executes `meson build -Db_coverage=true`, `cd build`, and `ninja`, and stores the entire repository as an artifact. In the test stage add a test_x86-64 job that depends on build_x86-64, runs `cd build`, `ninja test`, and `ninja coverage-html`, and also uploads the whole repository as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on tags and on the master branch of accounts-sso/gsignond-plugin-oa, depends on test_x86-64, runs `cd build`, `ninja install`, `cd ..`, `mkdir public`, and `cp -a build/docs/html/* public`, and publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact.
